title: Incorrect result from a LEFT JOIN with a row-value constraint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b INT, c VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(a INT, b INT, c VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'default');
SELECT * FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t2.a = t1.a AND t2.b = t1.b WHERE t1.c IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with row-value constraint produces incorrect results
